summary: Iteration 59 - v5.0.0 Killer Features Testing Complete. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Three new killer features fully functional: 1) Next Best Action Engine with AI-powered recommendations, 2) Practice Health Dashboard with real-time metrics, 3) Meeting Workflow Automation. Frontend displays all new features correctly including Practice Health Score (84 B+), Next Best Actions with priority badges and execute buttons.

issues: Important Information modal appears on every page load - requires checkbox acknowledgment. Has 'Don't show this again' option but persists across sessions.

critical_code_review_comments: v5.0.0 upgrade successful - health check returns version 5.0.0 with killer_features array
Next Best Action Engine generates prioritized actions across 8 clients with tax, rebalancing, compliance, retention, goal, and revenue categories
Practice Health Dashboard provides comprehensive metrics: health score 84 (B+), compliance 95.2%, capacity 78% utilized
Meeting Workflow Automation supports full lifecycle: schedule, process notes, create tasks, update CRM
Frontend Advisor Command Center displays all new features with proper data-testid attributes
Action cards show priority badges (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM), impact values, and Execute buttons
AI-POWERED badge displayed on Next Best Actions section
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data in route modules (8 clients in CLIENTS_DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified v5.0.0 killer features. Key endpoints: /api/next-action/today (prioritized actions), /api/next-action/all (all actions), /api/next-action/client/{id} (client-specific), /api/practice-health/dashboard (full dashboard), /api/practice-health/health-score (grade), /api/meeting-automation/schedule (create meeting), /api/meeting-automation/tasks (task list), /api/meeting-automation/workflow-stats (stats). Frontend shows Practice Health 84 B+, Next Best Actions with 4 action cards, Execute buttons, AI-POWERED badge.

mocked_apis.Bank_Feeds: MOCKED - Basiq CDR in demo mode
mocked_apis.Broker_Integrations: MOCKED - All brokers in demo mode

Practice_Health_Dashboard.GET /api/practice-health/dashboard: PASS - Returns comprehensive dashboard with all metrics
Practice_Health_Dashboard.GET /api/practice-health/health-score: PASS - Returns score 84.3 (B+) with component scores
Practice_Health_Dashboard.GET /api/practice-health/compliance: PASS - Returns compliance status (95.2% completion rate)

Meeting_Workflow_Automation.POST /api/meeting-automation/schedule: PASS - Creates meeting with auto-generated prep task
Meeting_Workflow_Automation.GET /api/meeting-automation/tasks: PASS - Returns task list with pending/overdue counts
